infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Eye Hear U needs camera access to recognize ASL signs.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Eye Hear U needs microphone access to record video clips of ASL signs.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Eye Hear U to access your camera to recognize ASL signs.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Eye Hear U to use the microphone for video recording.
